root_cause.summary: The OCS workflow had only one successful normalized cognition artifact because the openai provider slot failed with OpenAI provider unavailable before response/artifact creation. Cognition comparison then failed closed because it requires at least two artifacts.
root_cause.first_workflow_failure: at least two cognition artifacts are required for comparison

minimal_safe_fix.recommended_runtime_refinement: Add an explicit pre-comparison sufficiency gate after multi-provider cognition when successful cognition artifact count is less than two.
minimal_safe_fix.recommended_evidence_refinement: Surface provider failure replay references and concrete provider diagnostics in the fail-closed OCS summary.
minimal_safe_fix.operational_requirement_for_success: At least two provider slots must produce successful normalized LLM_COGNITION_ARTIFACT_V1 artifacts.

final_outputs.ROOT_CAUSE: One provider failed before response/artifact creation, leaving only one cognition artifact; comparison correctly requires at least two.
final_outputs.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: Add a pre-comparison artifact sufficiency gate with provider failure replay details; preserve the two-artifact comparison invariant.
